meaning: n.[地]基质(一种连续分布的细粒物质,其中镶嵌着沉积物或沉积岩的大颗粒)
examples: In the groundmass transplantation way, the survival rate was higher.
Any igneous rock with crystals embedded in a finer groundmass of minerals.
The groundmass has the same mineral components as phenocryst, and is composed of plagioclase, augite and olivine.
